title: Video generation hits warp speed
summary:
LTX-2 video generation gets a massive speed boost on new hardware, while the community ships four new apps and patches up the elevator game.

We migrated the LTX-2 video backend to a GH200 instance. End-to-end video generation times have dropped to a very reasonable 12-16 seconds. We also bolted on token authentication while we were under the hood.

The community directory absorbed four new projects today: Puzzel Math (elementary education), SciVis AI (sci-fi science illustrations), ItacaLab (graphic editor for authors), and ContentAI (business writing). A solid cross-section of people building weird and useful things on top of the API.

A couple of quality-of-life fixes landed for the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge. Bring-Your-Own-Pollen (BYOP) keys now persist in local storage so you don't have to re-type them on every visit, and hitting logout actually redirects you to the login screen. Basic state management, but we love to see it.
